description: Claude Code shared settings (canonical three-level nested hook format with matcher field). Bootstrap canonical: repo-root CLAUDE.md (Claude Code auto-load) → CORE_BOOTSTRAP.md (companion) → runtime/core-bootstrap.yaml (executable contract, projected to runtime.db generated_surfaces). User-specific permissions and overrides live in .claude/settings.local.json (gitignored). Do not duplicate obligations / format / enum content here; that lives in the canonical YAML. Hooks: SessionStart auto-loads bootstrap context so users never have to type /bootstrap; UserPromptSubmit pre-injects per-turn reminder; PreToolUse blocks non-Read tools until Receipt emitted; PostToolUse reminds if Receipt missing; Stop validates last assistant message contains Cognitive Mode block. All hooks write diagnostic logs to /tmp/ai-skill-*-hook.log for debugging.

hooks.command:
bash -c 'echo "$(date +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S) UserPromptSubmit fired" >> /tmp/ai-skill-prompt-hook.log; bootstrap=$(cat "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/CORE_BOOTSTRAP.md" 2>/dev/null); reminder="[ai-skill per-turn obligation] Final response MUST end with ### Cognitive Mode 報告 block. First-turn ALSO outputs Bootstrap Receipt. Canonical spec: runtime/core-bootstrap.yaml."; combined=$(printf "%s

---
%s" "$reminder" "$bootstrap"); printf "{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":%s}}" "$(/opt/homebrew/bin/jq -Rs . <<< "$combined")"'
